modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help setting up a Tax Sheltered Annuity.

full_description_text:  
Hola, I want to set up a Tax Sheltered Annuity.  
But I don’t know how to do it.  
Where can I find info on TSAs?  
I need some guidance, please!
short_description: Need help setting up a Tax Sheltered Annuity.
